content.en:
Half a billion years later.

Today's era is undoubtedly the most glorious era of the great universe, with countless Tianjiao being born and countless races contending.

The human race is no longer the number one race, many innate races were born one by one, and they rose rapidly with the support of the top powers, some innate races have very good talents, and they can become gods and even heavenly monarchs with a little training.

And there are more and more true monarchs of the major forces, and the heavenly monarch is completely unqualified to exist as a high-level one.

Even in the Void Heaven Palace, there are hundreds of True Monarchs, and the Heavenly Monarchs are close to tens of thousands.

Although the Terrans also have many Heavenly Monarchs and half-step True Spirits, there is no True Monarch at present, which has affected the status of the Terrans.

In addition, Ye Tian had been in retreat for too long, and it was difficult to help the Terrans, resulting in the current development of the Terrans coming to a standstill.

Of course, the current life of the human race is still many times better than that of the god race, the demon race and other races, at least the human race will not oppress, but the gods and demons can only survive as vassals.

......

The Dark Gods will.

The mysterious forces that once suffered heavy losses under Zero's attack have now grown stronger.

There are not many people in the Dark God Society in the Great Universe, but they continue to absorb the geniuses of various races and some innate races, after hundreds of millions of years of cultivation, there are more and more members, there are naturally many Heavenly Monarchs, and there are also some True Monarchs.

In addition, they are hidden deep enough, and other forces naturally do not dare to provoke them at will.

At this moment, a stronghold of the Dark God Society.

A True Monarch and a half-step True Spirit powerhouse were talking.

This True Monarch is one of the high-ranking members of the Dark God Society, named Poison Moth True Monarch, who is good at poison gods and is one of the vice presidents of the Dark God Society. The other is one of the new geniuses of the Dark God Society, Luo Feng from the Terran Race, who is very talented, and can be called one of the strongest geniuses of the Terran in this era.

He was valued by the Dark God Society very early, and recruited into the Dark God Society, and with the help of the Dark God Society, he rose quickly, and has become a powerful half-step true spirit, and the degree of integration of the physical body and the true spirit has reached ninety percent and five, and he will soon step into the level of the True Monarch.

But he was too low-key, and the human race didn't know him, only knowing that he was a half-step true spirit, but they didn't know that he was about to be promoted to the true monarch level.

"Luo Feng, I have an arrangement for you!"

Poison Moth Zhenjun said in a deep voice.

"Vice President, please command!" Luo Feng bowed his head and said.

"I hope you can control the Terrans, so that the geniuses of the Terrans can easily be introduced into our Dark God Society. The potential of the human race is still good, not only the genius of the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi was born, but also the genius of you, if this race is in our hands, our power will be stronger!" the Poison Moth True Monarch commanded.

"This is very simple!" Luo Feng smiled: "The high-end strength of the human race is not strong, except for a few half-step true spirits with a fusion degree of one or two, the others are very weak Heavenly Monarchs, far from being comparable to me." The only thing that is a little troublesome is the legendary Wanfa Daozi who is touted as a myth!"

That's right, in Luo Feng's eyes, Ye Tian is a genius who is touted.

When Ye Tian's fame resounded in the great universe, he was not yet born, and he grew up listening to Ye Tian's legend at that time.

In the past, he also admired Ye Tian, and even took Ye Tian as his goal.

But when he stepped into the god general, stepped into the heavenly monarch, and even now he is about to become the true monarch, but Ye Tian is still the heavenly monarch.

At this time, he looked down on Ye Tian a little, thinking that Ye Tian was just a vain.

Over the years, he has received many opinions from the Dark God Society, I don't know how many geniuses he has killed, and some geniuses are known to be rare to see in hundreds of millions of years, but they are still killed by him with one blow?

Therefore, he believes that genius is made by fighting, not by touting!

In his opinion, Ye Tian's greatest achievement was nothing more than killing a half-step true spirit who had just been promoted!

"Luo Feng, you can't underestimate the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, although he is still a Heavenly Monarch, his strength is definitely stronger than you!"

"Yes!"

Luo Feng didn't dare to refute the Poison Moth True Monarch, after all, compared with the half-step True Spirit and the True Monarch who had already stepped into the True Spirit Realm, there was a big gap in strength, and the Poison Moth True Monarch was once a Heavenly Monarch Heavenly Monarch, and it had been hundreds of millions of years since he entered the ranks of True Monarchs.

Now, the Poison Moth True Monarch's cultivation is already in the middle stage of the True Monarch, which is far from being comparable to him.

But in his heart, he still didn't think Ye Tian was so powerful!

After leaving this stronghold, Luo Feng returned to the Terrans.

According to the plan of the Dark God Society, he needs to become the leader of the Terrans, and he can basically control many rights of the Terrans.

And the main high-level of the human race are Xiao Yue, Ye Yu, Zhou Tian, Kunwu Tianjun, Chaoyuan Tianjun and others, these people are the oldest high-level of the human race, and their strength may not be stronger than some new geniuses, but their status is very high.

"Hmph, the human race should focus on strength, these people are far inferior to me, so they should give way!"

Luo Feng said hideously.

In fact, his status is not low, as one of the top ten elders of the human race, he has a lot of strength, but he is not satisfied with this, coupled with the plan of the Dark God Society this time, he is ready to become the human emperor of the human race!

The human race has never had an emperor now, Ye Tian is qualified to become the human emperor, but the human race almost does not manage the human race much, so naturally it cannot recognize the human emperor, and the strength of the others is not enough.

......

Terran, Temple.

In the name of the Ten Elders, Luo Feng convened a meeting of other elders and high-level officials, which was one of his rights.

Soon, a number of high-ranking people came to the temple.

"Luo Feng, what's the matter with convening the meeting this time?"

Xiao Yue asked.

"Xiao Yue Zhenjun, the development of our human race has reached a slow period now, and even many innate races are stronger than us, if this continues, our human race will be reduced to a situation where everyone is beaten!" Luo Feng said.

"Behind our human race, there is the Void Heaven Temple and the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, who dares to provoke us?"

Kunwu Tianjun Dao.

"Kunwu Heavenly Monarch, count on the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Son? Has he ever managed the human race? Moreover, with his current Heavenly Monarch's cultivation, what can he do in the current era of countless True Monarchs? It is better to count on the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Son!" Luo Feng said unceremoniously.

"Luo Feng, what do you mean by this???

One by one, the high-ranking Terran clans stared at Luo Feng, as if questioning Luo Feng.

Ye Tian's status in the Terran race is very high, after all, without Ye Tian, the Terran would have been wiped out long ago.

But when Luo Feng said such words, he was actually provoking Ye Tian!

"That's what I mean, I think the human race needs to choose a human emperor, and I suggest that the strongest person is the human emperor!"

Luo Feng said loudly.
